zh.lifeSummary: 當Eustachie De Rais ou Retz於大約1161年出生在法國時，她的父親Hascot de Raix or de Retz Seigneur de Raix28歲，母親Stéphanie de Prigny22歲。她於1199年3月3日與André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1209年享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eustachie De Rais ou Retz于大约1161年出生在法国时，她的父亲Hascot de Raix or de Retz Seigneur de Raix28岁，母亲Stéphanie de Prigny22岁。她于1199年3月3日与André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1209年享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rais
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Mohammed, Abdollah, Abdur, Ahmad, Amira, Fatima, Halim, Hamid, Jalal, Malik, Mohammad, Naushad.  German Theodor.  Czech Vaclav.
Muslim: from a personal name based on Arabic raʿīs ‘leader’, also found in combinations such as Raʿīs ud-Dīn ‘leader of religion’.
German and Swiss German: from the personal name Ragiso, a pet form of any of the ancient Germanic compound names beginning with the element rag-, a short form of ragin ‘counsel’.

variants.name: Zacharias
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Gerhard, Erna, Hannes, Helmut, Irmgard, Kurt, Lothar, Nikolaus, Rudi, Wolfgang.

German, English, Greek, and Jewish; Czech (Zachariáš) and Slovak (Zachariaš and Zachariáš): from a Biblical personal name, Greek Zacharias, Aramaic and Hebrew Zekharya, composed of the elements zekhar ‘to remember’ + ya ‘God’. This name was borne by a Biblical prophet and in the New Testament by the father of John the Baptist, for which reason it achieved a modest popularity among Gentiles during the Middle Ages. As a surname in Britain, it originated mainly among Nonconformists in Wales and Cornwall in the 17th and 18th centuries. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Zaccaria , Polish Zachariasz, Slovenian Caharija, and their derivatives. The name Zacharias is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Cherian , Zacharia , and Zachariah ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

variants.name: Rayes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ana, Asuncion, Carlos, Carolina, Genaro, Hermelo, Jose Natividad, Lilia, Luz, Mauricio, Modesto.  Arabic/Muslim Hassan, Ayman, Fouad, Kais, Khaldoun, Mohamed, Rania, Shamoon, Soha, Tamer, Wasim.
Muslim: variant of   Rais  .

nameMeanings.name: ou
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

variants.name: Ow
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
Chinese:
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou Yang
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ming, Wei, Hui, Jian, Hong, Chieh, Chu, Xin, Zhuo, Baoping, Biao, Bin, Hai, Pu, Quan, Tuan.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐陽, from Ou-Yu (歐餘), the name of a hill in Wucheng (in present-day Zhejiang province), which was granted to Ti, the second son of king Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ) in the state of Yue. Most of his descendants lived to the south of the hill called Ou-Yu (歐餘). The southern side of a hill was called Yang (陽) in ancient Chinese; the surname Ou-Yang (歐陽), literally means ‘the south of the Ou-Yu (歐餘) hill’. See also   Ou   1.

nameMeanings.name: Retz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German:
habitational name from any of several places called Retz or Retzen in northwestern Germany and Austria.
from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic compound personal names formed with rād, rāt ‘advice, counsel’.

variants.name: Retzer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Helmut, Helmuth, Reinhold.
German:
habitational name for someone from Retz in Austria (see   Retz  ).

nameMeanings.name: Eustachie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Late Greek. See Eustace .

en.lifeSummary: When Eustachie De Rais ou Retz was born about 1161, in France, her father, Hascot de Raix or de Retz Seigneur de Raix, was 28 and her mother, Stéphanie de Prigny, was 22. She married André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré on 3 March 1199. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1209, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eustachie De Rais ou Retz est née environ 1161, à France, son père, Hascot de Raix or de Retz Seigneur de Raix, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Stéphanie de Prigny, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré le 3 mars 1199. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1209, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eustachie De Rais ou Retz um 1161 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hascot de Raix or de Retz Seigneur de Raix 28 und ihre Mutter Stéphanie de Prigny 22. Sie hat am 3. März 1199 André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1209 im Alter von 49 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eustachie De Rais ou Retz è nata il circa 1161 nel Francia, sua padre, Hascot de Raix or de Retz Seigneur de Raix, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Stéphanie de Prigny, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré il 3 marzo 1199. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1209, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eustachie De Rais ou Retzが約1161年にフランスで生まれた時，父Hascot de Raix or de Retz Seigneur de Raixは28歳，母Stéphanie de Prignyは22歳であった。1199年3月3日にAndré II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitréと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1209年に49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eustachie De Rais ou Retz(이)가 대략 1161년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hascot de Raix or de Retz Seigneur de Raix(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Stéphanie de Prigny(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1199년 3월 3일 André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1209년 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eustachie De Rais ou Retz nasceu aproximadamente 1161, em França, seu pai, Hascot de Raix or de Retz Seigneur de Raix, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Stéphanie de Prigny, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré em 3 de março de 1199. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1209, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eustachie De Rais ou Retz родилась около 1161 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Hascot de Raix or de Retz Seigneur de Raix было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Stéphanie de Prigny, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré 3 марта 1199 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1209 г. в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eustachie De Rais ou Retz nació aproximadamente 1161, en Francia, su papá, Hascot de Raix or de Retz Seigneur de Raix, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Stéphanie de Prigny, tenía 22 años. Se casó con André II de Vitré, Seigneur de Vitré el 3 de marzo de 1199. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1209, a la edad de 49 años.
